headline: Jim Cramer Says Semiconductor Stocks Are “Going Down.” Buy These 2 Dividend Stocks Instead
summary: Jim Cramer is flashing warning signs on semiconductor stocks and one high-flying AI name he says still has further to fall, but he sees two dividend stocks built to weather exactly this kind of chaos.

headline: Quanta vs. EMCOR: Which Infrastructure Stock Is the Better Buy?
summary: Could EMCOR's lower valuation, superior ROIC and rising earnings estimates make it the better infrastructure stock to buy now?

headline: Jim Cramer Says Microchip Is Near A Bottom — 'I Don't See It Yet' — While Nebius Is 'Not Done Going Down'
summary: Cramer gave his opinions on several stocks, including MCHP, VRT, AAOI, PWR, WCC, NBUS, COKE, and EXLS. He suggested waiting for better prices.
